overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity game engine showing a character exploring a historic Mediterranean-style tannery village. The character walks through an outdoor workspace with stone dyeing vats and wooden drying racks under bright midday sun, then turns to reveal a panoramic view of the village nestled against forested hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: tannery entrance with wooden drying racks

events.description: passing by NPC worker handling hides at wooden table on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tannery entrance, passing wooden racks with hanging hides and approaching the stone dyeing vats

notable_agents.action: worker leaning over a wooden table treating animal hides
worker sitting on a stone bench near stacked materials

entered.detail: tall wooden frames with hides hanging to dry, casting shadows on the ground
large rectangular stone basins filled with colored dye liquids in red and yellow hues
two-story weathered stone structure with small windows and fabric awnings
wooden wheelbarrow with large spoked wheel leaning against a wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a rustic outdoor tannery workspace, walking past wooden drying racks on the left where hides hang in the sun. Large stone dyeing vats appear on the right, filled with colored liquids. Two NPC workers are visible attending to their tasks as the character approaches the main stone building ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central tanning courtyard with dyeing pits

events.description: navigating between rows of stone tanning vats on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking carefully between the stone dyeing vats, observing the colored liquids and workspace

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the main building entrance, observing the area

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the tanning courtyard, now surrounded by stone dyeing vats on both sides filled with reddish and yellowish liquids. The wooden structures fall behind as the main stone building looms closer ahead. A worker stands near the building entrance watching the character approach.

events.description: character turns right to survey the village and surrounding landscape
view opens to reveal panoramic vista of village houses and forested hills

agents.ego_description: turning to face the village view, pausing to observe the surrounding landscape and distant structures

entered.detail: cluster of stone and timber village buildings with tiled roofs scattered across the hillside
dense green pine and deciduous forest covering the mountain slopes behind the village

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the main building to reveal a sweeping view of the village extending toward forested hills. The tanning vats now sit to the right while traditional stone houses cluster in the distance. The scene opens to show the rural settlement nestled in a lush green valley under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic outdoor tannery that gradually opens into a sweeping panoramic view of a Mediterranean village. It begins by moving past wooden drying racks and stone dyeing vats where workers attend to their tasks under the bright midday sun. As the camera pushes deeper into the courtyard, the wooden structures fall behind and the path becomes flanked on both sides by vats of reddish and yellowish liquids leading toward a looming stone building. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the building, causing the tanning vats to slide to the right while the horizon expands. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal a cluster of traditional stone houses nestled within a lush green valley against a backdrop of forested hills.
